Variables.Name: ScreenSize
Variables.Description: Screen size of the resulting proxy mesh in pixels

Variables.Name: MaterialSettings
Variables.Description: Material simplification

Variables.Name: bCalculateCorrectLODModel
Variables.Description: Determines whether or not the correct LOD models should be calculated given the source meshes and transition size

Variables.Name: MergeDistance
Variables.Description: Distance at which meshes should be merged together, this can close gaps like doors and windows in distant geometry

Variables.Name: HardAngleThreshold
Variables.Description: Angle at which a hard edge is introduced between faces

Variables.Name: LightMapResolution
Variables.Description: Lightmap resolution

Variables.Name: bComputeLightMapResolution
Variables.Description: If ticked will compute the lightmap resolution by summing the dimensions for each mesh included for merging

Variables.Name: bRecalculateNormals
Variables.Description: Whether Simplygon should recalculate normals, otherwise the normals channel will be sampled from the original mesh

Variables.Name: bUseLandscapeCulling
Variables.Description: Whether or not to use available landscape geometry to cull away invisible triangles

Variables.Name: LandscapeCullingPrecision
Variables.Description: Level of detail of the landscape that should be used for the culling

Variables.Name: bAssignLODGroup
Variables.Description: Choose whether you want to apply LODs to the generated mesh or not.

Variables.Name: ExpectedQualityLimit
Variables.Description: Render quality control for certain devicesplatforms, if limit > actual, primitive won't be rendered.

Variables.Name: bOverrideVoxelSize
Variables.Description: If true, Spatial Sampling Distance will not be automatically computed based on geometry and you must set it directly

Variables.Name: VoxelSize
Variables.Description: Override when converting multiple meshes for proxy LOD merging. Warning, large geometry with small sampling has very high memory costs

Variables.Name: UnresolvedGeometryColor
Variables.Description: Base color assigned to LOD geometry that can't be associated with the source geometry: e.g. doors and windows that have been closed by the Merge Distance

Variables.Name: bOverrideTransferDistance
Variables.Description: Enable an override for material transfer distance

Variables.Name: MaxRayCastDist
Variables.Description: Override search distance used when discovering texture values for simplified geometry. Useful when non-zero Merge Distance setting generates new geometry in concave corners.

Variables.Name: bUseHardAngleThreshold
Variables.Description: Enable the use of hard angle based vertex splitting

Variables.Name: NormalCalculationMethod
Variables.Description: Controls the method used to calculate the normal for the simplified geometry

Variables.Name: bAllowAdjacency
Variables.Description: Whether to allow adjacency buffers for tessellation in the merged mesh

Variables.Name: bAllowDistanceField
Variables.Description: Whether to allow distance field to be computed for this mesh. Disable this to save memory if the merged mesh will only be rendered in the distance.

Variables.Name: bReuseMeshLightmapUVs
Variables.Description: Whether to attempt to re-use the source mesh's lightmap UVs when baking the material or always generate a new set.

Variables.Name: bCreateCollision
Variables.Description: Whether to generate collision for the merged mesh

Variables.Name: bAllowVertexColors
Variables.Description: Whether to allow vertex colors saved in the merged mesh

Variables.Name: bGenerateLightmapUVs
Variables.Description: Whether to generate lightmap uvs for the merged mesh
